popularStory.headline: BIO

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaide de Gournay於大約1050年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Hugh II de Gournay21歲，母親Basilia de Fleitel28歲。她和Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1099年4月8日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯蒙特莫倫希享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaide de Gournay于大约1050年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Hugh II de Gournay21岁，母亲Basilia de Fleitel28岁。她和Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1099年4月8日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯蒙特莫倫希享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gournay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gourley  .

variants.name: Gourley
meanings: Scottish: possibly a Norman habitational name from North or South Gorley (Hampshire), or an unidentified place in Normandy, France.

nameMeanings.name: Adélaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaide de Gournay was born about 1050, in Normandy, France, her father, Hugh II de Gournay, was 21 and her mother, Basilia de Fleitel, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. She died on 8 April 1099, in Montmorency, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaide de Gournay est née environ 1050, à Normandie, France, son père, Hugh II de Gournay, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Basilia de Fleitel, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1099, à Montmorency, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaide de Gournay um 1050 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh II de Gournay 21 und ihre Mutter Basilia de Fleitel 28. Sie hatte mit Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. April 1099 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Montmorency, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaide de Gournay è nata il circa 1050 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugh II de Gournay, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Basilia de Fleitel, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. Morì il 8 aprile 1099, nel Montmorency, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaide de Gournayが約1050年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hugh II de Gournayは21歳，母Basilia de Fleitelは28歳であった。彼女はIves III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1099年4月8日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスモントモーエンシで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaide de Gournay(이)가 대략 1050년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh II de Gournay(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilia de Fleitel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 4월 8일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 몽모렌시에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaide de Gournay nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh II de Gournay, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Basilia de Fleitel, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1099, em Montmorency, Île-de-France, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaide de Gournay родилась около 1050 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh II de Gournay было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Basilia de Fleitel, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. Она умерла 8 апреля 1099 г. в местности монтморенси, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaide de Gournay nació aproximadamente 1050, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh II de Gournay, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Basilia de Fleitel, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont. Murió el 8 de abril de 1099, en Montmorency, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
